story:
Suffering Builds Character started as a team of enthusiasts determined to push aim training back into relevance. Our goal is to bring back an era of heavy micro training seamlessly incorporated into macro gameplay — proving that aim training, when used effectively, produces amazing feats.
We want to put aim training back on a path that produces monsters in PvP environments. The community has drifted from that — into an isolation factory full of misguidance and misuse: The aim community focuses on performance within the aim trainer, not on mechanics assisting macro symbiotically. 
Aim training should be accessible to everyone. If you're serious about sharpening your aim to dominate your game of choice — welcome to SBC.
